title: Which is better to choose Angular vs Reactjs?
excerpt: Hello, Can anyone tell me the which is better to choose Angular vs React js? and what are the benefits of using either of them while designing the framework?

posts.author: sowjanya (sowjanya 123)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, Can anyone tell me the which is better to choose Angular vs React js? and what are the benefits of using either of them while designing the framework?

posts.author: MelissaH (Melissa Hallbauer)
posts.cookedHtml: @sowjanya I think you’re posting in the wrong section. Try here instead.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sowjanya!

That’s totally up to you! Our team prefers to use React but it all depends on your level of familiarity and what you’re most comfortable with.

Thank you @MelissaH for directing them to the right place, too!

-Helen
